data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for background checks.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Background checks' requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding whether background checks were performed. The linked use case mentions background checks as a necessity, yet there is no concrete evidence or API reads that confirm this requirement was satisfied. This lack of evidence leads to an inconclusive result regarding the validation of this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that background checks were conducted.
